name: CAOS Pretest/Posttest
description: Paired pre/post CAOS statistics-assessment scores for 10 students (Ch. 20 paired data).
studyDescription: Ten students each took the CAOS statistics-reasoning assessment before and after a course. The pretest and posttest scores are paired within student.

variableDescriptions.pretest: CAOS assessment score (%) before the course.
variableDescriptions.posttest: CAOS assessment score (%) after the course.

sourceDetail: Coursepack (Stat 145). CAOS = Comprehensive Assessment of Outcomes in a first Statistics course.
